'''âr-b-h''' ('''rabaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:votekick|votekick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:votekick|votekick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-b-h
|-
! Lemma
| rabaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rabahithi|rabahithi]] || [[word:rabahiji|rabahiji]] || [[word:rabahishi|rabahishi]] || [[word:rabahi|rabahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabahuthuth|rabahuthuth]] || [[word:rabahujuj|rabahujuj]] || [[word:rabahushush|rabahushush]] || [[word:rabah|rabah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabahuthu|rabahuthu]] || [[word:rabahuju|rabahuju]] || [[word:rabahushu|rabahushu]] || [[word:rabahu|rabahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabahufuth|rabahufuth]] || [[word:rabahufuj|rabahufuj]] || [[word:rabahufush|rabahufush]] || [[word:rabahuf|rabahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rabahethe|rabahethe]] || [[word:rabaheje|rabaheje]] || [[word:rabaheshe|rabaheshe]] || [[word:rabahe|rabahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabahothoth|rabahothoth]] || [[word:rabahojoj|rabahojoj]] || [[word:rabahoshosh|rabahoshosh]] || [[word:rabah|rabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabahotho|rabahotho]] || [[word:rabahojo|rabahojo]] || [[word:rabahosho|rabahosho]] || [[word:rabaho|rabaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabahofoth|rabahofoth]] || [[word:rabahofoj|rabahofoj]] || [[word:rabahofosh|rabahofosh]] || [[word:rabahof|rabahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rabahĂŠthĂŠ|rabahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rabahĂŠjĂŠ|rabahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rabahĂŠshĂŠ|rabahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rabahĂŠ|rabahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabahathath|rabahathath]] || [[word:rabahajaj|rabahajaj]] || [[word:rabahashash|rabahashash]] || [[word:rabah|rabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabahatha|rabahatha]] || [[word:rabahaja|rabahaja]] || [[word:rabahasha|rabahasha]] || [[word:rabaha|rabaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabahafath|rabahafath]] || [[word:rabahafaj|rabahafaj]] || [[word:rabahafash|rabahafash]] || [[word:rabahaf|rabahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:rabahasha|rabahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorabahasha|gorabahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirabahasha|gokirabahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:rabahnĂŒsha|rabahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorabahnknĂŒsha|gorabahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirabahnĂŒsha|gokirabahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rabahshĂ«sha|rabahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorabahnkshĂ«sha|gorabahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirabahshĂ«sha|gokirabahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabahrosha|rabahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabahnkrosha|gorabahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabahrosha|gokirabahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rabahmusha|rabahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabahnkmusha|gorabahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabahmusha|gokirabahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rabahsherasha|rabahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorabahnksherasha|gorabahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirabahsherasha|gokirabahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:rabahngasha|rabahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorabahnkngasha|gorabahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirabahngasha|gokirabahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rabahyasha|rabahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorabahnkyasha|gorabahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirabahyasha|gokirabahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:rabahyamasha|rabahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorabahnkyamasha|gorabahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirabahyamasha|gokirabahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:rabahnĂŒshĂ«sha|rabahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorabahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gorabahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirabahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokirabahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabahnĂŒrosha|rabahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabahnknĂŒrosha|gorabahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabahnĂŒrosha|gokirabahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabahnĂŒmusha|rabahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabahnknĂŒmusha|gorabahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabahnĂŒmusha|gokirabahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rabahshĂ«nĂŒsha|rabahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorabahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gorabahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirabahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokirabahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabahshĂ«rosha|rabahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabahnkshĂ«rosha|gorabahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabahshĂ«rosha|gokirabahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabahshĂ«musha|rabahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabahnkshĂ«musha|gorabahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabahshĂ«musha|gokirabahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:rabahronĂŒsha|rabahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorabahnkronĂŒsha|gorabahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirabahronĂŒsha|gokirabahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:rabahroshĂ«sha|rabahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorabahnkroshĂ«sha|gorabahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirabahroshĂ«sha|gokirabahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabahromusha|rabahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabahnkromusha|gorabahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabahromusha|gokirabahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rabahmunĂŒsha|rabahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorabahnkmunĂŒsha|gorabahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirabahmunĂŒsha|gokirabahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rabahmushĂ«sha|rabahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorabahnkmushĂ«sha|gorabahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirabahmushĂ«sha|gokirabahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabahmurosha|rabahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabahnkmurosha|gorabahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabahmurosha|gokirabahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:rabah|rabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠh|rĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horabah|horabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠbĂŠh|horĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorabah|hohorabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠbĂŠh|hohorĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒrabah|nĂŒrabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠbĂŠh|nĂŒrĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrabah|nĂŒnĂŒrabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠbĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻrabah|nĂŻrabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠbĂŠh|nĂŻrĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrabah|nĂŻnĂŻrabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠbĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurabah|lurabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠbĂŠh|lurĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurabah|lulurabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠbĂŠh|lulurĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirabah|lirabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠbĂŠh|lirĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirabah|lilirabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠbĂŠh|lilirĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korabah|korabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠbĂŠh|korĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorabah|kokorabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠbĂŠh|kokorĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerabah|kerabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠbĂŠh|kerĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerabah|kekerabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠbĂŠh|kekerĂŠbĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
